title: saussurea elongata subsp. recurvata
intro: Saussurea elongata subsp. recurvata is a subspecies of the Saussurea elongata plant, commonly known as the saussurea or saussurea root, a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Saussurea elongata subsp. recurvata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the root of the plant is typically dried and processed into a powder or tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
